response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack and geospatial experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ or Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed geospatial pipelines — critical for this role. Their C++ exposure is limited to academic/legacy NI LabWindows work, and their GIS projects use DLang and Node.js, not the required stack. No evidence of fault-tolerant data pipelines, routing tile optimization, or real-time traffic integration.
strengths: Strong open-source geospatial project experience with GISCollective
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and domains
Demonstrated commitment to testing, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship
concerns: No commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing or navigation systems
Geospatial work uses DLang/Node.js, not the required C++/Linux pipeline stack
Lacks demonstrated experience with distributed systems, consistency, or routing tile optimization
